import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema"

<Heading as={"h1"} className={"openapi__heading"} children={"Issues a Verifiable Credential"}></Heading>

<MethodEndpoint method={"post"} path={"/credentials"} context={"endpoint"}></MethodEndpoint>

This endpoint creates a verifiable credential that attests that the user authenticated with the provided access token owns a
certain public/private key pair.

More information can be found at https://openid.net/specs/openid-connect-userinfo-vc-1_0.html.

<Heading id={"request"} as={"h2"} className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails></ParamsDetails>
